enchantment.minecraft.fire_protection.de: Reduces fire damage and burn time.
enchantment.minecraft.thorns.desc: Damages attackers at the cost of durability.
enchantment.minecraft.frost_walker.desc: Freezes water underfoot and prevents magma damage.
enchantment.minecraft.binding_curse.desc: Prevents removal of equipped armor items.
enchantment.minecraft.soul_speed.desc: Increases walking speed on soul sand and soul soil.
enchantment.minecraft.bane_of_arthropods: Increases damage and slows arthropod mobs.
enchantment.minecraft.efficiency.desc: Increases mining speed and axe shield-stunning chance.
enchantment.minecraft.silk_touch.desc: Mined blocks drop themselves instead of items.
enchantment.minecraft.fortune.desc: Increases certain item drop chances from blocks.
enchantment.minecraft.infinity.desc: Shooting does not consume regular arrows.
enchantment.minecraft.impaling.desc: Trident deals extra damage to ocean mobs.
enchantment.minecraft.riptide.desc: Trident launches the player when thrown in water or rain.
enchantment.minecraft.channeling.desc: Trident summons lightning on hit during thunderstorms.
enchantment.minecraft.multishot.desc: Shoots three arrows at the cost of one.
enchantment.minecraft.density.desc: Increases mace damage based on fall distance.
enchantment.minecraft.breach.desc: Negates a portion of enemy armor value.
enchantment.minecraft.wind_burst.desc: Launches the player upward upon successful mace hits.
enchantment.minecraft.lunge.desc: Spear jabs grant speed at the cost of hunger.
enchantment.minecraft.mending.desc: Repairs the item using experience orbs.
